svg.title: Blank APC40 mkII control-surface template
svg.desc: A label-free white vector template with black outlines for every top-panel control.

g.text: APC40 mkII — Standard Layout (Expert) · every control mapped
dashed = PROPOSED (capture a UI specimen first)
CONTROL REFERENCE — what every label does

text.tspan: dashboard slots 1–4: Mix · Rate · Energy · Color
dashboard slots 5–8: Size · Space · Texture · Morph
→ Layer Dashboard 1–8, banked across layers by Track Sel
launch clips — Pulse / Body / Structure / Bed
launch a whole look = a composition column (all layers)
eject the clip on that layer
bank the Device knobs across layers (silent to Resolume)
Activator — layer on / off (LED lit = visible)
Layer Master — Bed · Struct · Body · Pulse
selected-clip play mode — Loop / Bounce / Play-Once
previous / next clip on selected layer
device lock — ignore column trigger (hold a layer)
select layer (▲ top…▼ bottom) · prev/next column (◄►)
CLEAN FX — bypass performance FX + reset
DRY ↔ performance FX (Crossfader Phase drives FX 4–7)
